ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instances" (
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instance */,
  "instance_name" TEXT /* Name of the instance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the instance */,
  "problem_type" TEXT /* Type of problem being solved (e.g., linear, non-linear) */,
  "problem_size" INTEGER /* Size of the problem (e.g., number of variables) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the instance was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the instance was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solvers" (
  "solver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solver */,
  "solver_name" TEXT /* Name of the solver */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the solver */,
  "solver_type" TEXT /* Type of solver (e.g., exact, heuristic) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the solver */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the solver was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the solver was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runtime_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each runtime log */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related instance */,
  "solver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solver used */,
  "actual_runtime" REAL /* Actual runtime recorded for the solver */,
  "predicted_runtime" REAL /* Predicted runtime based on previous data */,
  "prediction_std_error" REAL /* Standard error for the predicted runtime */,
  "machine_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine where the solver was run */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage during the solver run */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage during the solver run */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runtime_logs_solver_id FOREIGN KEY ("solver_id") REFERENCES solvers ("solver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runtime_logs_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES instances ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related instance */,
  "solver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solver used */,
  "average_runtime" REAL /* Average runtime across multiple logs for the instance and solver */,
  "average_error" REAL /* Average prediction standard error across logs */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Success rate of the solver for the instance */,
  "timeout_rate" REAL /* Timeout rate of the solver for the instance */,
  "average_cpu_usage" REAL /* Average CPU usage during solver runs */,
  "average_memory_usage" REAL /* Average memory usage during solver runs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES instances ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_solver_id FOREIGN KEY ("solver_id") REFERENCES solvers ("solver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin, analyst) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log or metric being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_downloaded" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether data was downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES runtime_logs ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solver_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration entry */,
  "solver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solver related to this configuration */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter being configured */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value assigned to the parameter */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solver_configurations_solver_id FOREIGN KEY ("solver_id") REFERENCES solvers ("solver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction entry */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related instance */,
  "solver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solver for which the prediction is made */,
  "predicted_runtime" REAL /* Predicted runtime based on historical performance */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (e.g., 0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES instances ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_solver_id FOREIGN KEY ("solver_id") REFERENCES solvers ("solver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_analysis" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error analysis entry */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related log entry */,
  "actual_runtime" REAL /* Actual runtime from the log */,
  "predicted_runtime" REAL /* Predicted runtime for the log */,
  "error" REAL /* Calculated error between actual and predicted */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of error (e.g., absolute, relative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_analysis_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES runtime_logs ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the notification is sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., warning, info) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solver_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "solver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solver related to this version */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Brief description of changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solver_versions_solver_id FOREIGN KEY ("solver_id") REFERENCES solvers ("solver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solver_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency entry */,
  "solver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solver that depends on another solver */,
  "dependent_solver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solver being depended on */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., Optional, Required) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solver_dependencies_dependent_solver_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_solver_id") REFERENCES solvers ("solver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solver_dependencies_solver_id FOREIGN KEY ("solver_id") REFERENCES solvers ("solver_id")
)
